title: × pleopodium leucosporum
intro: × Pleopodium leucosporum, also known as the Pleopodium leucosporum plant, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Pleopodium leucosporum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
